data.headline: Gracious Living in Fairfield County
data.body: With 25 years of expertise in Connecticut's most sought-after communities, Isabelle Fontaine offers unparalleled guidance for buyers and sellers of distinguished properties.

data.title: Recent Sales
data.subtitle: A selection of distinguished properties represented

items.text: Isabelle's knowledge of the Fairfield County market is unparalleled. She helped us find our dream home in Greenwich with remarkable grace and patience.
A truly refined and gracious experience from start to finish. Isabelle's attention to every detail made the sale of our Darien home effortless and profitable.
We couldn't have asked for a more dedicated or knowledgeable advocate. Isabelle secured us a magnificent property in New Canaan well above our expectations.

data.title: What's Your Property Worth?
data.subtitle: Complimentary Market Analysis
data.description: Receive a **complimentary market analysis** prepared with the care and precision your property deserves. No obligation — simply the insight you need.

data.title: About Isabelle Fontaine
bio: Isabelle Fontaine has spent 25 years representing buyers and sellers of Fairfield County's most distinguished properties. Known for her quiet elegance, deep market knowledge, and unwavering commitment to her clients, she has established herself as one of Connecticut's most trusted real estate advisors.

Having personally guided over $850 million in residential transactions, Isabelle brings a rare combination of analytical precision and gracious service to every engagement. Her fluency in English and French, combined with her extensive network across Greenwich, Darien, New Canaan, and Westport, allows her to serve an exceptional range of clientele.

A proud member of the Connecticut Real Estate Network (CREN) and consistently recognized among the top 1% of agents statewide, Isabelle approaches each relationship with the discretion and care it deserves.

thank_you.title: Thank You for Reaching Out
thank_you.subtitle: We will be in touch within 24 hours to discuss your property.
thank_you.body: Every relationship at Fontaine & Partners begins with a conversation. We look forward to learning about your real estate goals and exploring how we may best serve you.
